heading: Kangaroo Flat vs Kangaroo Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangaroo Flat, South Australia and Kangaroo Head, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kangaroo Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kangaroo Head (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangaroo Flat or Kangaroo Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Flat has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Kangaroo Head scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Flat scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Kangaroo Head scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangaroo Flat or Kangaroo Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kangaroo Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
